title: US Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8's chipset is now confirmed
description: Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Flip8 was certified by the FCC earlier this month. Now, the folks over at Android Authority have done a deep dive into the documents that the FCC has published, and they have discovered clear confirmation that the phone will be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset. The image below references the SoC's model number, which is SM8850. So, the Galaxy Z Flip8 will definitely be powered by Qualcomm's latest and greatest chip in the US. According to a previous report, only Korea and Europe will see the phone with the Exynos 2600 SoC instead. Every...

title: Redmi 17C debuts with Helio G81 Ultra chipset, very low price
description: The Redmi 17C is now official. It comes with a 6.88-inch 720x1640 IPS LCD screen with 600-nit peak brightness and a 120Hz refresh rate, a 13MP rear camera, a 5MP front camera, and a 5,160mAh battery with 18W charging support. It's powered by the MediaTek Helio G81 Ultra chipset, paired with 4GB of RAM and 64/128GB of expandable storage. The phone is offered in black, red, and light blue, and it features a side-mounted fingerprint scanner. Redmi 17C official images The Redmi 17C measures 171.88 x 77.8 x 8.22 mm and weighs 206g. It runs HyperOS 3 based on Android 16. It's...

title: iQOO Neo11s is coming very soon, here are its main specs
description: iQOO launched the Neo11 in China last October, and now it's apparently working on a new variation of this device, that may end up being called the Neo11s or Neo11 SE. We'll refer to it as the Neo11s for simplicity. According to Digital Chat Station on Weibo, this phone will be powered by an underclocked version of the Dimensity 9500 SoC. Despite this one having a CPU with cores clocked lower than the normal Dimensity 9500, the performance is allegedly going to still be "decent". It will probably still beat the Dimensity 9500s, for what it's worth. iQOO Neo11 We assume this means...

title: Prime Day UK Deals: Apple Watch Series 11, AirPods 4 and AirPods Max discounted
description: Continuing our Prime Day coverage, we've got some Apple Watch and AirPods deals from Amazon UK. This time we have the Apple Watch Series 11 in both its GPS and cellular trims as well as the AirPods 4 and AirPods Max (2024). As a reminder, these offers are subject to stock availability and require an active Prime membership. title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra to get a screen upgrade
description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra is reportedly the successor to the Galaxy Z Fold7 from last year, and it's expected to be unveiled on July 22 in London alongside the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Flip8, Galaxy Watch9, and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2. Today a new rumor from Ice Universe suggests the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra will come with a bump in screen resolution compared to the Galaxy Z Fold7. Unfortunately, he doesn’t mention what the resolution will actually be, just that it's "significantly enhanced". He also doesn't say which screen will benefit. For reference, the Galaxy Z Fold7 has...

title: Honor said to be developing a phone with a massive 14,000mAh battery
description: Honor recently unveiled the X80 Pro Max in China with an 11,000mAh battery, the largest ever in one of its smartphones. However, a new leak suggests the company is already working on another handset that could pack an even bigger battery. According to well-known tipster Digital Chat Station, Honor is testing a new device with a massive 14,000mAh battery. While the tipster didn't mention the brand by name, the emoji used in the post is commonly associated with Honor. The device is reportedly in the NPI (New Product Introduction) stage, indicating that it is still undergoing...

title: Prime Day UK Deals: M4 MacBook Air, MacBook Neo and iPad Air (2025) discounted
description: It’s day two of Prime Day, and we’re now bringing you a few offers on Apple MacBooks and iPads from Amazon UK. Like with other Prime Day deals, these offers are subject to stock availability and require an active Prime membership. MacBooks MacBook Air 13 (M4) £100 off 16/256GB - £799 at Amazon UK MacBook Air 15 (M4) £140 off 16/512GB - £1,159 at Amazon UK ...

title: Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Limited Edition drives into India
description: If you've always admired Pininfarina's iconic automotive designs but a Ferrari Testarossa is out of reach, Infinix has a far more affordable alternative. The company has launched the Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Limited Edition in India. The phone was designed in collaboration with the famed Italian design house and features an aerospace-grade aluminum frame paired with a carbon fiber finish rear panel. It also gets red accent lines around the rear camera module. The limited edition package includes a MagPad wireless charger, a black charging adapter with a braided USB Type-C cable, a...

description: This is day 2 of Amazon’s annual Prime Day shopping event – this isn’t the end, Amazon extended this to a 4-day event. title: Redmi K90 Ultra to launch next week, design and key specs revealed
description: After confirming its existence last week, Redmi has now announced the launch date for the K90 Ultra. Alongside the announcement, the company has also revealed the phone's design and confirmed several of its key features. The Redmi K90 Ultra will be unveiled in China on June 30, the company confirmed via a post on Weibo. Redmi's upcoming K90 series smartphone will be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite chipset. However, the company claims it can match, or even outperform, devices equipped with the newer Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC in gaming performance. According to Redmi, this is...

title: Here’s another batch of Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 renders
description: The last few days have been filled with leaks for the upcoming Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, and Evan Blass decided to come out of retirement to share a new batch of official-looking renders. Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 renders (source: Evan Blass) The images show a familiar design, in line with previous reports. For the most part, Watch Ultra 2 looks nearly identical to its predecessor but we can spot slightly thinner display bezels and new bezel markers. Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 render (source: Evan Blass) We can also see the back of the device reveals it will...

title: Meta Glasses unveiled in partnership with EssilorLuxottica
description: Meta has unveiled its new Meta Glasses, developed in partnership with EssilorLuxottica. The AI-powered smart glasses are available in three frame styles, including a special edition created in collaboration with Kylie Jenner. The Meta Glasses feature a 12MP camera, much like the Ray-Ban Meta glasses. They can capture videos in up to 3K resolution at 30fps and still images at a resolution of 3,024 x 4,032 pixels. The AI glasses include adjustable three-way nose pads, adjustable temple tips, and overextension hinges for a better fit. A dedicated action button provides quick access to...

title: Tecno's EllaClaw AI agent gains cross-app automation and system-level device optimization
description: Back in March, Tecno unveiled EllaClaw, its own OpenClaw port designed to automate tasks on its smartphones. Today, the company is introducing new features for EllaClaw, including cross-app automation and system-level device optimization. The cloud-based agent can now optimize mobile data, battery life, and storage space. EllaClaw works efficiently in the background, simplifying complex workflows with strict permission safeguards. With simple prompts, it can use features like Smart CleanUp Boost to resolve system lag by freeing up RAM and CPU resources. It can also deploy Smart...

title: First details about the Oppo Find X10 Ultra's cameras have emerged
description: Oppo is already working on the Find X10 Ultra, according to a new leak from Digital Chat Station on Weibo. The Find X9 Ultra was launched in May, so its successor is definitely not coming this year. Still, the first details about the Find X10 Ultra's cameras are now out. [#InlinePriceWidget,14548,1#] Specifically, its long-range telephoto. As you may know, the Find X9 Ultra has a 50MP periscope telephoto camera with 10x optical zoom, which uses a 1/2.75-inch type sensor. The Find X10 Ultra, on the other hand, will have a 1/1.95-inch type sensor for its 10x telephoto, while keeping the...

title: Google Chrome gets advanced autofill on Android and iOS, deeper Google Wallet support
description: Google Chrome's expanded autofill capabilities are now available on both Android and iOS. You can save time on flight check-ins and parking payments, for example. Autofill is also getting deeper integration with Google Wallet across mobile and desktop. This means Chrome can autofill information from your Google Wallet, such as your driver’s license details, passport information, as well as your Known Traveler Number. And if those details aren't saved in Google Wallet, you can add them directly from Chrome when you enter them for the first time. Google promises that...

title: Nothing Phone (4b) spotted on Geekbench ahead of launch
description: The Nothing Phone (4b) is set to launch in India and select global markets on July 7. While Nothing has only shared a rough design sketch of the handset so far, the upcoming phone has now surfaced on Geekbench, revealing some of its key specs. A Nothing smartphone carrying the model number A009P, believed to be the upcoming Phone (4b), has appeared on Geekbench. The benchmark listing reveals that the handset is powered by Qualcomm's SM6650 chipset, better known as the Snapdragon 6 Gen 4. It is paired with 8GB of RAM, an Adreno 810 GPU, and is running Android 16. In Geekbench's...

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 renders leak, more details revealed about the Watch Ultra 2 too
description: Recently some details about Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Watch9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 have been revealed, and now a new leak brings us even more information about them. At the same time, CAD-based renders of the Watch9 have been outed in three colors. Samsung Galaxy Watch9 in Silver The Galaxy Watch9 will allegedly come in two sizes, 40mm and 44mm, each with Bluetooth-only and LTE options. The smaller model will be available in Cream and Graphite colors, while the larger one will be offered in Graphite and Silver. Samsung Galaxy Watch9 in Graphite The...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, and Flip8 colors and storage options leak
description: Samsung is rumored to be holding its next Unpacked event in London on July 22, where it's expected to unveil the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip8, alongside the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and Galaxy Watch9. Today a new leak brings us details about the phones' colors and storage options. The Fold8, which is allegedly the wide one, will be available in Cream, Graphite, Lavender, and Pistachio, with 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB of storage. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 (left) and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra (right) dummy units The Fold8 Ultra, on the other hand, will be offered in Cream,...
